steps.title: Identify the requested emphasis
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how Wilkerson documents the Great Migration. The relevant note says Wilkerson documents the period by narrating personal journeys of Clara Mae Benton, Arthur Coleman Ellis, and others.

steps.title: Choose the method-focused option
steps.content: Choice B mentions only Clara Mae Benton, so it is too narrow. Choice C focuses on awards, and choice D gives migration context about Los Angeles. The remaining choice explains Wilkerson's method: chronicling the Great Migration in personal detail through individual journeys. The answer is A.
